title: T-080 — bootstrap org.platform.admin Apex seed runbook + migration (FT-020)
prompt:
# T-080 — bootstrap org.platform.admin Apex seed runbook + migration (FT-020)

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §3, §4.2, §8
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Original carry-forward ID: **FT-020** (from `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-final-carry-forward-backlog.md`)
Severity: **P0** (S effort)

## Goal
Seed org.platform.admin into Apex tenant with a runbook and an idempotent assignment script.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration 030 INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING the role row into roles + binds default permissions.
2. Runbook walks ops through `pnpm seed:platform-admin --email ops@apex.local` and verification.
3. Script is idempotent: re-running with the same email is a no-op.
4. Unit test mocks DB and asserts idempotent behavior + audit_events row creation.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/migrations/030-bootstrap-platform-admin.sql [create]
- docs/runbooks/platform-admin-bootstrap.md [create]
- scripts/seed-platform-admin.ts [create]
- scripts/__tests__/seed-platform-admin.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 030 applied, when roles is inspected for the Apex org, then org.platform.admin row exists.
2. Given the seed script is run twice with the same --email, when both runs complete, then roles row count is unchanged and an audit_events row is logged once per first grant only.
3. Given the runbook is followed by ops on a clean Supabase, when complete, then `org.platform.admin` is granted to the named human and the canary-upgrade routes return 200 (not 403).

## Test strategy
- RED: write seed-platform-admin.test.ts asserting idempotency before script exists.
- Mock DB pool via vi.fn().
- Run `pnpm test seed-platform-admin`.

## Risk red lines
- P0 deploy blocker — do not merge without GREEN evidence on staging
- Do not seed the role to a default email; require an --email argument.
- Do not skip the idempotency assertion.
- Do not log the granted user's email in plaintext beyond audit_events.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED-first) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

pipeline_inputs.description: Bootstrap org.platform.admin for the Apex tenant via migration + runbook; without this seed, T-039's canary-upgrade Server Actions return 403 in production.
